extraction.one_line_summary: IZAGIRRE Gorka won stage 11 after repeatedly covering early breakaway attacks, then soloing in final 1.5km when chasers hesitated.
tactical_patterns: IZAGIRRE exposed himself covering every attack in 14-rider break, but this aggressive policing left him freshest for final move.
O'CONNOR attacked early in breakaway to test who would chase, immediately revealing IZAGIRRE as primary threat before paying price later.
Chasers hesitated when within 10 seconds with 1500m remaining, allowing IZAGIRRE's solo to stick despite group momentum advantage.
Dimension Data placed two riders (O'CONNOR 37min down, AMANUEL 38min down) in break, rare GC positioning tactic for wildcard team.

rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Gorka: positive: showed counterintuitive freshness after chasing everything early, suggests exceptional recovery capacity within breakaways
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: positive: second consecutive day bridging gaps aggressively, finished third after massive effort suggests improved grand tour form
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: tactical attack smart but paid immediately, went red zone and dropped on climbs afterward
rider_signals.HAUSER Damien: positive: bridged multiple times solo showing power, but lacked final kick when group reformed
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Rémi: neutral: attacked late with apparent strength but caught in final hesitation that cost group the win
